# F031 Delta-Direction JEPA Tier 2 Validation

## Decision
`F031_PROTECTED_TIER2_PASS_LOCAL_RIDGE_FLOOR_NOT_PRESERVED`

## Purpose
F030 passed Tier 1 after adding stop-gradient teacher-delta direction and source-improvement losses. F031 tests whether that result holds across five synthetic seeds and whether the direct JEPA predictor preserves both the protected historical floor and the same-representation train-only ridge floor.

## Tier 2 Checks
- protected Tier 2 pass: `True`
- active gate pass: `True`
- local same-representation ridge floor preserved: `False`
- cross-modal healthy: `True`
- transition std <= protected effect: `True`

## Mean Metrics
- direct transition improvement: `0.330428` +/- `0.160901`
- direct delta cosine: `0.846683` +/- `0.039928`
- direct recall@1: `0.740741` +/- `0.090722`
- direct delta rank: `10.463763`
- same-representation ridge transition: `0.363495`
- local floor gap transition: `-0.033068` (min `-0.058580`)
- local floor gap delta cosine: `-0.070622` (min `-0.157417`)
- local floor gap recall: `-0.066667` (min `-0.185185`)
- RNA->image recall@1: `0.711111`
- image->RNA recall@1: `0.807407`
- action-negative transition gap: `0.044594`

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. Tier 2 can only justify a future Tier 3/no-regression plan, and failure to preserve the same-representation ridge floor requires a floor-preserving transition-head pivot before promotion can be considered.
